# Threlte 8

> Threlte is an open-source 3D framework for Svelte. Build interactive 3D apps for the web with declarative, reactive components powered by Three.js.

These docs describe Threlte 8, the current stable major version. Threlte 7 docs are archived at https://v7.threlte.xyz.

## Learn

### Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/getting-started/introduction)
- [Installation](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/getting-started/installation)
- [Your First Scene](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/getting-started/your-first-scene)

### Basics

- [App Structure](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/basics/app-structure)
- [Loading Assets](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/basics/loading-assets)
- [Handling Events](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/basics/handling-events)
- [Scheduling Tasks](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/basics/scheduling-tasks)
- [Render Modes](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/basics/render-modes)
- [Disposing Objects](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/basics/disposing-objects)

### Advanced

- [Plugins](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/advanced/plugins)
- [Custom Abstractions](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/advanced/custom-abstractions)
- [WebGPU and TSL](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/advanced/webgpu)

### More

- [Migration Guides](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/advanced/migration-guides)
- [Resources](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/learn/more/resources)

- [Interactive Shader](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/examples/shaders/interactive-shader)
- [Scope With Zoom](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/examples/shaders/scope-with-zoom)
- [Shadowmesh](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/examples/shadows/shadowmesh)
- [Animating A Spaceship](https://threlte.xyz/previews/pr-1751/docs/examples/tutorials/animating-a-spaceship)
